items.summary: I absolutely love this game. One issue I'm facing is that I can only play it with mobile data. whenever I'm using wifi the game tells me to check my internet connection even though it's perfectly fine.... Please help Devs

items.summary: Story is good. Gameplay feel and looks better than on screenshots and videos. One thing to note, older player say this half ani is more greedy and kinda predatory. I don't think it is bad, but I do think it is important to know for ppl thinking to start. Also dupes here very imp, keep it in mind too.

items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 Se agradece que aún si es con GPT se pon
items.summary: Se agradece que aún si es con GPT se pongan otros idiomas como el Español, siempre es bueno entender que intenta contar un juego, sumado a éso en el rato que lo eh jugado es muy interesante y muy generoso, muchas recompensas para lograr armar un buen equipo al empezar, sumado a su complejidad según que facción uses, muy buen juego la verdad.
items.author: Roxeren

items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 It's one of a few games I wanted to rate
items.summary: It's one of a few games I wanted to rate and recommend cause it's good and underrated. it's about cute Lovecraft monsters! I love both gameplay and the story, though I'd say that for me story is more important, it's often tragic but also hopeful. please give it a chance
